economic_notes: Nation has significant investment in businesses via modified equity method including FM Business Trust (total revenue $36.9M, expenses $33.2M), Christina River Enterprises, FMFN Holdings LP, and FM #468 FN LP. Related party subcontract to councillor-owned company of $154,292. COVID-19 subsequent event noted.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2020. Auditor signed January 18, 2021. Nation has 5 fully consolidated subsidiaries and 5 GBEs accounted for by modified equity method. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $7,193,633 + ISC Health $1,314,657 + CMHC $24,334 + Other government funding $233,700 + ATC $330,397 = $9,096,721; deferred revenue adjustments not separated by source so OSR is approximate. ISC Native Claims loans of $1,113,957 are interest-free and not included in long-term debt figure above (long-term debt is $1,572,413 per balance sheet). COVID-19 noted as subsequent event. Related party transaction with councillor-owned company. No remuneration schedule included in the financial statements. Gain from investments ($2,173,766) is included in total revenue/surplus but reported as 'other revenue' below the operating line.
